chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI H.C.A. No.22 of 2011 Muhammad Shafique Versus Tauseef Hanif & others Date Order with signature of Judge For orders as to non-prosecution of appeal as notices not issued, process fee not paid by counsel for the appellant since 11.3.22. Dated: 29.04.2024 Mr. Anwar Ali Shah for appellant. None for respondents. -.-.- Learned counsel for appellant submits that appellant is not in his contact since long and perhaps he has lost interest in the proceedings, as stated. Instant High Court Appeal is accordingly dismissed for non- prosecution. Judge Judge
